caption: An elderly man with grey hair and glasses delivers a speech from a wooden podium in a room featuring vertical wooden blinds. He wears a blue patterned shirt adorned with a decorative collar, a beaded necklace, and an emblem on his chest. As the scene progresses, he gestures with his hands while speaking into a black microphone positioned in front of him. The back of the heads of several audience members are visible in the foreground. A speaker stands to the left of the podium. A logo featuring a stylized purple leaf is visible on the front of the podium, and the text "ORCA" appears in white letters on a black background in the lower right of each frame. Between the frames, the man shifts his posture and hand positions, moving from a still position behind the podium to actively gesturing as he continues his presentation.
